_comment: STING sustainability-gate rules — LEED v5 / BREEAM v6 / EN 15978.
_help: Each rule has a 'where' (filter — which materials it applies to)
and a 'fail' (predicate — what makes it trigger).
Both 'where' and 'fail' use the same predicate shape:
Severity: Info | Warning | Block (Block is reserved for transaction-time gating).

rules.message: Concrete embodied carbon > 410 kgCO2e/m3 — exceeds LEED v5 MR low-carbon credit threshold.
Steel embodied carbon > 2000 kgCO2e/m3 — exceeds LEED v5 MR low-carbon credit threshold for hot-rolled steel.
EPD older than 5 years — refresh provenance before relying on the embodied carbon value.
No EPD source documented — carbon value (if any) is not certified.
Insulation embodied carbon > 600 kgCO2e/m3 — common BREEAM Mat 01 ceiling for thermal insulation.
Glazing embodied carbon > 700 kgCO2e/m3 — review for low-emissivity / recycled-content alternatives.
Material is off the STING baseline (BLE_* / MEP_* / STING_*) — confirm spec before issuing.
